title: Smoky Gratin Vegetarian Casserole
description: A comforting, cheesy casserole perfect for a cold evening. The smoky flavor from the paprika and the crispy top make it a standout dish.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the garlic and cook until fragrant.
Add the French onion soup to the skillet and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let it cook for 5 minutes.
Stir in the smoked paprika and cook for an additional minute.
In a separate bowl, mix the cozy grated cheese and chopped parsley.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, arrange the casabe croutons in the bottom.
Pour the onion soup mixture over the croutons.
Top with the cheese and parsley mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is hot and bubbly.
